_doc: Tool registration for the eve CLI. Dropped at /etc/sinister/mcp/eve-cli.json. EVE daemon picks this up via inotify and exposes each subcommand as an MCP tool + REST callable.
description: The eve command-line client. Wraps the daemon's REST surface for shell users.

subcommands.name: status
subcommands.description: Show daemon status, LLM backend health, last 5 heartbeats.

subcommands.name: up
subcommands.description: Bring sinister-eve.service up via systemctl start.

subcommands.name: down
subcommands.description: Take sinister-eve.service down via systemctl stop.

subcommands.name: tools
subcommands.description: List every registered MCP tool the daemon knows about.

subcommands.name: say
subcommands.description: Send a free-form intent string to /v1/intent/dispatch.

args.name: intent
args.description: The intent string. Example: 'open my JB Woodworks dashboard'
